overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a dark, stormy swamp shoreline. The character casts the Igni sign to illuminate the path while walking along the water's edge through an atmospheric, desolate landscape with dead trees and distant ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy swamp shoreline with dead trees and murky water

events.description: Geralt casts the Igni sign, creating a bright flame in his right hand to illuminate the dark surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the muddy shore while holding the Igni sign to light the path ahead

entered.detail: murky dark water stretching to the horizon with mist rising from the surface
dense cluster of leafless dead trees silhouetted against the stormy sky
dark forest line marking the edge of the swamp
clump of tall yellow grass growing on the muddy shore
wet sandy and muddy bank along the water's edge
vague silhouette of ruined structures visible through the haze across the water

segments.scene_description: Geralt stands on a desolate swamp shore beneath stormy dusk skies. He casts the Igni sign, creating a bright flame that casts dynamic shadows on the muddy ground. The camera follows from behind as he begins walking along the water's edge, with dead forests visible in the distance and tall grass tufts growing along the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved swamp shoreline approaching distant ruins

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved shoreline, moving closer to the distant ruins while the Igni sign illuminates the path

entered.detail: small rocks and debris scattered along the shore

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues his slow walk along the curved swamp shore, the Igni sign casting flickering light on the muddy ground. The distant ruins become slightly more defined as he approaches, while the initial grass tufts fall behind. The stormy sky remains overhead with occasional light breaking through the clouds, maintaining the atmospheric, desolate mood of the wetland environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate swamp shoreline that gradually reveals distant ruins under a stormy dusk sky. It begins with Geralt casting the Igni sign, creating a bright flame that casts dynamic shadows across the muddy ground as he starts to walk. As he advances along the water's edge, the camera follows from behind, moving past tufts of tall grass while dead forests loom in the distance. The scene then shifts as the shoreline curves, with the flickering light of the flame illuminating the path while the distant ruins become more defined. Finally, the camera maintains its steady pace through the wetland environment, where occasional light breaks through the heavy clouds to highlight the atmospheric desolation.
